response.original_title: DJ Shadow - Full Performance (Live on KEXP) | January 24, 2024
response.overview: KEXP presents DJ Shadow performing live in the KEXP studio. Recorded January 24, 2024.  1.  DJ Shadow - Ubu 2.  DJ Shadow - You Played Me 3.  DJ Shadow feat Q-Tip & Lateef The Truth Speaker - Enuff 4.  DJ Shadow feat Divine Styler - Divine Intervention 5.  DJ Shadow feat Ernie Fresh - The Sideshow 6.  DJ Shadow feat Barny Fletcher - Two Notes 7.  DJ Shadow - The Number Song 8.  Zack De La Rocha & DJ Shadow - March Of Death 9.  DJ Shadow - If I Died Today 10.  DJ Shadow - Long Stem 11.  DJ Shadow - A Narrow Escape 12.  DJ Shadow - What Does Your Soul Look Like (Peshay Remix) 13.  DJ Shadow - I Gotta Rokk 14.  DJ Shadow-  Six Days (Remix) 15.  DJ Shadow - I Gotta Rokk (Irn Mnky Swagger Mix) 16.  DJ Shadow feat Danny Brown - Horror Show 17.  DJ Shadow feat Run The Jewels - Nobody Speak  Josh Davis (DJ Shadow)  Host: Troy Nelson Audio Engineer: Kevin Suggs Mastering: Matt Ogaz Cameras: Alaia D’Alessandro, Jim Beckmann, Scott Holpainen Editor: Jim Beckmann
response.title: DJ Shadow - Full Performance (Live on KEXP) | January 24, 2024
